description: So you are looking to build an Autumn Capsule Wardrobe 2021? You have come to the right place. If you have an existing capsule wardrobe or need help creating one, I always say be careful to buy intentionally. Do not add trends because they are trends. Add them if they fit with your wardrobe and will complement it perfectly. This season vibrant colours have made a comeback. Fiery shades that can brighten up the dullest of days.
